body: Like a tape delay, changing the delay time while audio is in the buffer slides the pitch of the echoes (varispeed). Automating time is a quick way to get diving, warping repeats, and BPM sync keeps the timing intact through tempo changes.

Distortion and saturation dirty the echoes, bandpass filtering (separate high- and low-pass) keeps repeats out of the way of the dry signal, wow and flutter add analog instability, and diffusion smears transients toward a reverb-like ambient tail.
